name: Deal Stage Gates
description: Horizontal stage gate tracker for deal and project progression with approval checkpoints, approver avatars, and milestone date tracking.

horizontal.description: Horizontal row of stage gates connected by progress bars for standard pipeline tracking across sales, legal, and operations workflows

vertical.description: Vertical sidebar layout for deal pages where stage progression appears alongside primary content with compact stage indicators

milestone.description: Milestone variant with date labels, SLA indicators, and elapsed-time tracking for time-bound deal progression and reporting

visual_brief: A horizontal row of rounded rectangle stage gates (approximately 180x88px each) connected by horizontal progress bars. Each gate has a gate icon at top (32px), stage name in semibold 13px (e.g. 'Qualification', 'Negotiation', 'Signed'), completion percentage in smaller muted text, and 2-3 approver avatars (24px overlapping circles) at the bottom. Passed gates have a filled green background with a large white check icon, and avatars display a subtle verified-ring. The current active gate has a pulsing primary-color outline with a glow animation and the gate icon rendered in primary color. Future gates are dimmed to 50% opacity with muted borders. Progress connectors between gates are 4px tall horizontal bars: fully filled between passed gates, half-filled into current gate, empty from current forward. Approval badges appear as small corner pills on passed gates ('Approved' in green). In milestone preset, date labels appear below each gate showing expected and actual completion dates with delta chips.

slots.stage-gate: Individual gate card (d-surface, data-interactive) representing one stage. Contains gate icon, stage name, completion percentage, approver avatars, and approval badge.
slots.gate-icon: Icon representing the stage type (document, handshake, signature, etc.). 32px, rendered in state-appropriate color: success green for passed, primary for active, muted for future.
slots.stage-name: Stage label in semibold 13px type. Truncates with ellipsis if too long.
slots.approval-badge: Small pill at top-right of passed gates showing 'Approved' in success styling with check icon.
slots.progress-connector: Horizontal bar (4px tall) between adjacent gates visualizing progression. Fill width indicates transition state: 0% empty, 50% half (active transition), 100% complete.
slots.approver-avatars: Stacked overlapping avatars (24px, 8px overlap) at bottom of gate showing users who have approved or must approve. Verified ring on approved users.
slots.date-label: Milestone-variant-only: date text below gate showing expected/actual completion with color-coded delta (ahead/on-time/late).

responsive.mobile: Stages reflow to vertical stack. Progress connectors rotate 90 degrees. Gate width expands to container width. Avatar count reduces to show count-only indicator.
responsive.tablet: Horizontal layout maintained but gates compress to 140px wide with abbreviated stage names.
responsive.desktop: Full horizontal layout with all stages visible, hover interactions, and full stage names.

micro.active-gate-pulse: outline glow 2s ease-in-out infinite on current gate

transitions.stage-advance: progress-connector fill-sweep 600ms ease-in-out + check-icon draw on new passed gate

ambient.current-gate-glow: border-shadow pulse matching primary color 2s ease-in-out infinite

composition.StageGate: Card(d-surface, data-interactive, data-state) > [GateIcon + StageName + PercentageLabel + ApproverAvatars + ApprovalBadge?]

keyboard: A: view approvers for focused stage
